title: Hotspot Café
description: Designed and developed a modern, animated website using React for a local café business, featuring smooth UI animations and transitions to enhance user engagement and visual appeal. Check it out at https://hotspot22.cz/

title: Fosum Classic Cars
description: Developed a sleek, animated React landing page for classic cars, a company specializing in high-end vintage vehicles, featuring a showroom reservation form that simplifies booking visits and improves customer engagement. Check it out at https://fochum.love2do.cz/

title: Hollywood AI
description: Developed and deployed a user-friendly platform for AI-powered film summaries, achieving a 95% satisfaction rate based on feedback on accuracy and readability, using Next.js. TypeScript, Firebase. Check it out at https://hollywoodai.vercel.app
